title: Planning Optional Extension Boundary
goal: Implement #464 by making non-core planning capabilities explicitly discoverable or config-enabled rather than default installed surfaces.
non_goals: Do not create separate packages in this slice.
Do not remove optional capabilities entirely.
Do not make optional-extension config more expensive than the payload reduction.

intent.outcome: Review, intake, recovery, reporting, orchestration, and autopilot surfaces are clearly optional and reachable through compact discovery or explicit enablement.
intent.constraints: Keep core planning usable without optional surfaces and preserve dogfooding access in this repo.
intent.latitude: Choose compact config/discovery mechanics using existing commands where possible.
intent.escalation: Escalate if optional enablement requires a broad new command surface or re-expands first-contact payload.

execution.next_step: Inspect current optional payload discovery and config surfaces after #463 shrink.
execution.proof: planning package tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof selector, and planning doctor

invariants: Optional surfaces do not return to default install.
This repo can still dogfood advanced planning extensions explicitly.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #461: make Agentic Planning smaller by default and clearer by boundary.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #465 and #466 still need extraction-boundary and capability-map follow-through after optional extension boundary lands.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #464 closeout, promote #465 or the next #461 child indicated by validation

parent_lane.title: Reclassify planning payload into core, optional extensions, and extraction candidates

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Move review, intake, recovery, and autopilot surfaces behind config or on-demand discovery.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not re-expand default install or ordinary startup.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact existing command/config surfaces to carry discovery and enablement.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The solution requires new permanent first-contact surfaces.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #461/#464, #463 diff, payload classification, installer/list-files/skills/report surfaces
context_budget.externalize before shift: record optional extension discovery and enablement surface in execution_summary
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #464 planning optional extension boundary.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before adding a new command or restoring optional files to default install.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep optional power cheap to discover but absent from the default installed surface.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can a repo intentionally enable richer planning workflows without making ordinary repos pay the surface cost?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to optional-extension discovery and explicit enablement.

immediate_next_action: Inspect existing config, list-files, skills, report, and README surfaces for optional-extension discovery.
Add the smallest enable/discover mechanism that satisfies #464 without adding first-contact burden.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
Use existing compact commands before adding new surfaces.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_packaging.py -q
uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Non-core planning capabilities are not always present in default installs.
Agents can discover and enable them when the repo has the relevant problem.
Startup and summary remain focused on active execution state.
This repo can explicitly enable advanced planning extensions for dogfooding.

closure_check.evidence carried forward: #464 owns optional extension boundary after #463 default shrink.
closure_check.reopen trigger: optional planning capabilities require broad manual file reads or default install residue to discover

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted after #463 shrank default planning install.
